deep_dive.title: GRKV: Global Regression for Training-Free KV Cache Compression in Long-Context LLMs
deep_dive.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) with extended context lengths rely on the key-value (KV) cache to support attention over prior tokens. However, maintaining the KV cache incurs substantial memory overhead, motivating KV-cache compression methods that enforce a fixed budget through eviction and merging. Modern eviction methods increasingly adopt span-based retention because preserving contiguous spans is empirically effective and better preserves semantic coherence. Yet, when combined with post-eviction merging, span-based retention concentrates merges onto a small set of span-boundary carrier tokens, producing a highly imbalanced merge pattern that exacerbates over-merging and increases information loss. To address this imbalance, we propose GRKV (Global Regression for KV Cache), a training-free KV-cache merging method that directly minimizes the discrepancy between compressed-cache and full-cache attention outputs. GRKV uses ridge-regression-based merge steps to distribute information from evicted tokens across retained tokens, while regularizing the updates to prevent over-smoothing. Across the LongBench and RULER long-context benchmarks, GRKV is the only merging method that improves overall performance with minimal overhead.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: KV cache compression for long-context LLMs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 长上下文大语言模型的KV缓存压缩
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 长上下文大语言模型的KV缓存压缩
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 长上下文大语言模型的KV缓存压缩
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: GRKV proposes a training-free KV cache compression method using global regression to address span-based retention imbalance in long-context LLMs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: GRKV提出了一种免训练的KV缓存压缩方法，通过全局回归解决长上下文大语言模型中基于跨度的保留不平衡问题。它降低了内存开销同时保持语义一致性。实验表明在长上下文基准上优于现有的驱逐和合并方法。该方法无需额外训练即可实现高效的长上下文推理。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: GRKV提出了一种免训练的KV缓存压缩方法，通过全局回归解决长上下文大语言模型中基于跨度的保留不平衡问题。它降低了内存开销同时保持语义一致性。实验表明在长上下文基准上优于现有的驱逐和合并方法。该方法无需额外训练即可实现高效的长上下文推理。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: KV cache reuse in large language model inference

quick_skim.title: SiDP: Memory-Efficient Data Parallelism for Offline LLM Inference
quick_skim.abstract: The rapid adoption of large language models (LLMs) has shifted a substantial portion of inference workloads into throughput-oriented offline regimes, where fully utilizing GPU compute requires large batch sizes. However, existing deployments face a structural tension. Data parallelism (DP) scales throughput well but replicates model weights, leaving limited GPU memory for key-value (KV) cache and constraining batch size. Model parallelism reduces per-device weights, but requires fine-grained synchronization that erodes DP's independence and scheduling flexibility. We present SiDP, a memory-efficient data-parallel paradigm for offline LLM inference that treats weights as a bandwidth-backed shared resource inside a DP group. Instead of storing the full model on every GPU, SiDP organizes weights as a distributed pool: each layer is owned by a single GPU, and other replicas access its weights on demand via two complementary execution modes: a Weight-as-a-Service (WaS) mode that streams remote weights over NVLink into a small cache in the large-batch regime, and a Compute-as-a-Service (CaS) mode that ships activations to owners in the small-batch tail. Evaluated on NVIDIA H20, H200, and B200 GPUs with Qwen3-32B, Qwen2.5-72B, and Llama-3.1-70B, SiDP increases usable KV capacity by up to 1.8x under the same configurations, and converts this into up to 1.5x higher end-to-end throughput over baselines (vLLM) for offline workloads.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: memory-efficient data parallelism frees GPU memory for KV cache, enabling larger batches for long-context inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 内存高效数据并行释放GPU内存用于KV缓存，支持长上下文推理的大批量处理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 内存高效数据并行释放GPU内存用于KV缓存，支持长上下文推理的大批量处理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 内存高效数据并行释放GPU内存用于KV缓存，支持长上下文推理的大批量处理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SiDP proposes a memory-efficient data-parallel paradigm that treats weights as a shared resource, freeing memory for KV cache and enabling larger batch sizes for offline LLM inference, which indirectly accelerates long-context inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有的LLM离线推理中，数据并行复制模型权重导致KV缓存内存不足，限制批大小。SiDP将权重视为带宽支持的共享资源，在数据并行组内共享，从而释放GPU内存给KV缓存，支持更大批量和更长上下文处理，提升推理吞吐。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有的LLM离线推理中，数据并行复制模型权重导致KV缓存内存不足，限制批大小。SiDP将权重视为带宽支持的共享资源，在数据并行组内共享，从而释放GPU内存给KV缓存，支持更大批量和更长上下文处理，提升推理吞吐。

quick_skim.title: Probing the Prompt KV Cache: Where It Becomes Dispensable
quick_skim.abstract: Prior KV cache compression schemes empirically demonstrate that the prompt cache is partially redundant during decoding, dropping or summarising entries with little accuracy loss. We ask when and what kind of redundancy: at which layers, after how many decoding steps, and in what form can the prompt span KV cache be replaced without breaking the task. A controlled splice intervention swept over layer cutoff and decoding steps shows this redundancy is about form (chat template scaffolding) rather than content. Replacing the upper layer prompt span KV cache with KV cache from a chat template scaffold whose user content is a neutral filler recovers near clean accuracy, while zeroing the same slots collapses accuracy. The dissociation replicates across the Qwen3, Gemma 3, and Llama 3 families on multiple datasets.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: probes prompt KV cache redundancy, informs KV cache reuse strategies
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 探测提示KV缓存冗余性，为KV缓存复用提供见解
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 探测提示KV缓存冗余性，为KV缓存复用提供见解
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 探测提示KV缓存冗余性，为KV缓存复用提供见解
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper probes when and why the prompt KV cache is dispensable during decoding, finding redundancy stems from chat template scaffolding rather than content, informing KV cache reuse and compression.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文通过可控拼接实验探索了提示KV缓存在解码过程中何时变得冗余。研究发现，提示缓存的冗余主要来自聊天模板脚手架而非实际内容。用中性填充的用户内容替换上层提示缓存几乎不损失精度，而直接置零则严重下降。该结论为KV缓存复用和压缩提供了重要见解，有助于加速长上下文推理。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文通过可控拼接实验探索了提示KV缓存在解码过程中何时变得冗余。研究发现，提示缓存的冗余主要来自聊天模板脚手架而非实际内容。用中性填充的用户内容替换上层提示缓存几乎不损失精度，而直接置零则严重下降。该结论为KV缓存复用和压缩提供了重要见解，有助于加速长上下文推理。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: KV cache reuse in large language model inference

quick_skim.title: Linear Scaling Video VLMs for Long Video Understanding
quick_skim.abstract: Video vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in long-horizon and streaming settings, yet most video encoders still rely on spatiotemporal self-attention, causing compute and latency to grow quadratically with the number of frames. Existing efficiency methods improve scalability but often lose accuracy relative to full self-attention, for example through aggressive frame/token dropping or coarse attention approximations. We introduce StateKV, an inference-time method that adapts pretrained long-video VLMs to linear-time video prefill by carrying cross-frame context in a fixed-capacity, importance-based recurrent state, paired with a second full per-frame cache used for decoding. Across three long-video benchmarks and seven models spanning three families and multiple scales, StateKV remains close to full self-attention and consistently outperforms dominant sliding-window / recency-based streaming approximations, without fine-tuning or architectural changes. StateKV also reduces video-prefill cost measured FLOPs, enabling stronger accuracy at a fixed compute budget by running larger models. These results suggest a practical step toward scalable long-video understanding.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: StateKV: linear-time video prefill using fixed-capacity recurrent state and per-frame cache for long video understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: StateKV：固定容量循环状态和逐帧缓存实现长视频理解中的线性时间预填充
quick_skim.llm_evidence: StateKV：固定容量循环状态和逐帧缓存实现长视频理解中的线性时间预填充
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: StateKV：固定容量循环状态和逐帧缓存实现长视频理解中的线性时间预填充
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: StateKV adapts pretrained VLMs to linear-time prefill by using a fixed-capacity recurrent state and a full per-frame cache, enabling efficient long video inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 长视频VLM中自注意力机制导致计算量随帧数平方增长。本文提出StateKV推理时方法，通过固定容量基于重要性的循环状态携带跨帧上下文，并配合全帧缓存用于解码，实现线性时间视频预填充。在三个长视频基准和七个模型上验证，该方法在保持精度的同时显著降低延迟。虽然面向视频领域，但其跨帧上下文缓存思想可迁移到长上下文LLM推理加速。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 长视频VLM中自注意力机制导致计算量随帧数平方增长。本文提出StateKV推理时方法，通过固定容量基于重要性的循环状态携带跨帧上下文，并配合全帧缓存用于解码，实现线性时间视频预填充。在三个长视频基准和七个模型上验证，该方法在保持精度的同时显著降低延迟。虽然面向视频领域，但其跨帧上下文缓存思想可迁移到长上下文LLM推理加速。
